text: Product Manager Fellowship Overview: Duration 16 Weeks, Live Hours 100+ Hours. Next cohort starts Cohort 48 (Starts April 4).
Product Manager Fellowship Cost: Base price is ₹49,999, discounted to ₹34,999. Price increase deadline: 8 Mar 11:59 PM.

Instructors and Mentors for Product Manager Fellowship: Arindam Mukherjee, Kartik Singh, Eshan Tiwari, Shailesh Sharma, Prashanth Bhaskar, Akash Agrawal, Ankita Pathak, Devansh Jain, Nikita Agrawal, Parth Dixit, Anuj Saxena.
Product Manager Fellowship Outcomes: Average Salary 14-18 Lakhs, Highest Salary 31 Lakhs. Placement Support: 1 Year.

Product Manager Fellowship (PM) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 1: Mapping Business Outcomes to Product Outcomes - Systems thinking, Understanding Business Models, Structured thinking with KPI trees, Actors, Actions & Entities

Product Manager Fellowship (PM) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 2: Product Discovery & User Research - Impact Mapping & Opportunity sizing, User Segmentation, User Research Techniques, Journey Mapping & Personas

Product Manager Fellowship (PM) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 3: Problem Framing & Ideation - Problem Framing Canvas, Ideation & Product Risks, Outcome-Opportunity-Solution tree, User Flows & Wireframing
Product Manager Fellowship (PM) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 4: UX Foundations & AI Prototyping - UX Laws, Information architecture, AI assisted prototyping, Spec driven development
Product Manager Fellowship (PM) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 5: Growth & Metrics - Loops & Funnels, Product Market Fit Framework, How to define metrics, North Star, AAARR, guardrail metrics
Product Manager Fellowship (PM) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 6: Tech Foundations - Client server architecture, APIs, Webhooks, SDKs, System Design Concepts, AI System architecture
Product Manager Fellowship (PM) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 7: LLMs & Prompt Engineering - How LLMs work, Prompt types & CoT, System/role style guides, Prompt Decay & Debugging

Product Manager Fellowship (PM) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 8: RAGs, Fine Tuning & AI Automations - Embeddings & Vector Databases, Chunking & retrieval, Workflow triggers & JSON, Orchestrating LLM steps
Product Manager Fellowship (PM) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 9: AI Agents & Protocols - ReAct & planner–executor, Tool selection policies, Memory & RAG grounding, AI Agent Protocols: MCP, A2A, ACP
UI/UX Designer Fellowship Overview: Duration 4 Months, Live Hours 100+ Hours. Next cohort starts Cohort 48 (Starts April 4).
UI/UX Designer Fellowship Cost: Base price is ₹49,999, discounted to ₹34,999. Price increase deadline: 8 Mar 11:59 PM.

Instructors and Mentors for UI/UX Designer Fellowship: Karthi Subbaraman, Kartik Singh, Ranganath Krishnamani, Neel Raj, Shahee Nannore Hiran, Marmik Patel, Shamayita Debnath, Arpita Dhir, Siddharth Jain, Pranav Gupta.
UI/UX Designer Fellowship Outcomes: Average Salary 8-12 Lakhs, Highest Salary 31 Lakhs. Placement Support: 1 Year.

UI/UX Designer Fellowship (UX / UI Design) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 1: Business Thinking in Design - Systems thinking, Understanding Business Models, Structured thinking with KPI trees, Actors, Actions & Entities

UI/UX Designer Fellowship (UX / UI Design) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 2: Product Discovery & User Research - Impact Mapping & Opportunity sizing, User Segmentation, User Research Techniques, Journey Mapping & Personas

UI/UX Designer Fellowship (UX / UI Design) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 3: Problem Framing & Ideation - Problem Framing Canvas, Ideation & Product Risks, Outcome-Opportunity-Solution tree, User Flows & Wireframing
UI/UX Designer Fellowship (UX / UI Design) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 4: UX Foundations & AI Prototyping - UX Laws, Information architecture, AI assisted prototyping, Spec driven development
UI/UX Designer Fellowship (UX / UI Design) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 5: Intro to Visual Design - Gestalt’s Principles, Scale & Visual Hierarchy, Balance & Contrast, Visual Design elements
UI/UX Designer Fellowship (UX / UI Design) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 6: Visual Design Language - Moodboarding, Colour Theory, Typography, Grids & layouts
UI/UX Designer Fellowship (UX / UI Design) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 7: Understanding Design Systems - Inclusive design practices, Design Accessibility, Atomic Design systems, Design Systems Tools

UI/UX Designer Fellowship (UX / UI Design) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 8: Android Material Design Deepdive - Components in Android Material Design, Material Design Toolbar, Navigation View, RecyclerView and CardView
UI/UX Designer Fellowship (UX / UI Design) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 9: iOS HIG Deepdive - Navigation & Layouts, User controls, Views, Inputs & Selection, Feedback & Status
UI/UX Designer Fellowship (UX / UI Design) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 10: Agentic UX & AI Design
UI/UX Designer Fellowship (UX / UI Design) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 11: Building a UX Design Portfolio
UI/UX Designer Fellowship (UX / UI Design) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 12: Portfolio Presentation
Data Analyst Fellowship Overview: Duration 16 Weeks, Live Hours ~100 Hours. Next cohort starts Cohort 48 (Starts April 4).
Data Analyst Fellowship Cost: Base price is ₹49,999, discounted to ₹34,999. Price increase deadline: 8 Mar 11:59 PM.
Instructors and Mentors for Data Analyst Fellowship: Sahil Agarwal, Sumit Shukla, Rishav Kumar, Akash Garg, Saksham Arora, Vivek Kumar, Praneeta Gupta, Ankush Kumar, Vishnubhotla Naga Bharadwaj.
Data Analyst Fellowship Outcomes: Average Salary 8-10 Lakhs, Highest Salary 31 Lakhs. Placement Support: 1 Year.
Data Analyst Fellowship (DA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 0: Data and Structured Thinking - Systems thinking, Understanding Business Models, Structured thinking with KPI trees

Data Analyst Fellowship (DA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 1: Introduction to Data Analytics - Understanding Types of Data, Metrics & types of analysis, Steps in exploratory data analysis, Introduction to data visualisation

Data Analyst Fellowship (DA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 2: Data Preparation using Excel - Basic Functions & Shortcuts, Data Formatting Techniques, Data Cleaning Techniques, Data Protection & Error Validation

Data Analyst Fellowship (DA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 3: Advanced Data Analysis using Excel - Lookup & Merging Techniques, PivotTable & Grouping, Conditional Formatting, Scenario and Sensitivity Analysis

Data Analyst Fellowship (DA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 4: Business Dashboarding with Excel - Charts and Visualization Techniques, Data Visualisation Best Practices, Pivot Charts, Building interactive Dashboards

Data Analyst Fellowship (DA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 5: SQL Foundation - Introduction to Database, Selection, Filtering & Ordering, Data Types, Operators and functions, Aggregate and Group By commands
Data Analyst Fellowship (DA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 6: Data Manipulation with SQL - Conditional and Case Statements, Working with date/timestamps, Joins, Subqueries
Data Analyst Fellowship (DA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 7: Advanced Data Manipulation with SQL - Common Table Expression (CTE), Window functions in SQL, SET operators

Data Analyst Fellowship (DA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 8: Data Preparation & Exploration with Tableau - Loading Data on Tableau, Data Cleaning & Preparation Techniques, Aggregation and Logical Functions, Filters & Analytics in Tableau

Data Analyst Fellowship (DA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 9: Data Visualisation with Tableau - Understanding Chart Types, Creating Charts in Tableau, LOD and Calculated Fields, Creating Dashboards & Stories
Data Analyst Fellowship (DA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 10: Introduction to Python - Python Environment setup, Programming Fundamentals, Data Types, Strings, Sets, Tuples & List
Data Analyst Fellowship (DA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 11: Programming in Python - Dictionaries, Conditional Statements, Loop and Control Flow, Functions
Data Analyst Fellowship (DA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 12: Data Analysis using Python
Data Analyst Fellowship (DA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 13: Data Visualisation using Python
Data Analyst Fellowship (DA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 14: LLMs & Prompt Engineering
Business Analyst Fellowship Overview: Duration 18 Weeks, Live Hours 150+ Hours. Next cohort starts Cohort 48 (Starts April 4).
Business Analyst Fellowship Cost: Base price is ₹49,999, discounted to ₹34,999. Price increase deadline: 8 Mar 11:59 PM.
Instructors and Mentors for Business Analyst Fellowship: Arindam Mukherjee, Sahil Agarwal, Saksham Arora, Rishav Kumar, Varun Talikoti, Akash Garg, Praneeta Gupta, Ankush Kumar, Shashank Mittal.
Business Analyst Fellowship Outcomes: Average Salary 8-10 Lakhs, Highest Salary 31 Lakhs. Placement Support: 1 Year.

Business Analyst Fellowship (BA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 1: Business Models & KPIs - Systems thinking, Understanding Business Models, Structured thinking with KPI trees, Actors, Actions & Entities

Business Analyst Fellowship (BA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 2: Market Sizing & User Research - Impact Mapping & Opportunity sizing, User Segmentation, User Research Techniques, Journey Mapping & Personas

Business Analyst Fellowship (BA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 3: Problem Framing & Requirements Gathering - Problem Framing Canvas, Ideation & Product Risks, Outcome-Opportunity-Solution tree, Business Requirements Document (BRD)

Business Analyst Fellowship (BA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 4: Metrics & Data Instrumentation - How to define metrics, North Star, AAARR, guardrail metrics, Events & Variables, Data analysis techniques

Business Analyst Fellowship (BA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 5: Introduction to Data Analytics - Understanding Types of Data, Metrics & types of analysis, Steps in exploratory data analysis, Introduction to data visualisation

Business Analyst Fellowship (BA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 6: Data Preparation using Excel - Basic Functions & Shortcuts, Data Formatting Techniques, Data Cleaning Techniques, Data Protection & Error Validation

Business Analyst Fellowship (BA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 7: Advanced Data Analysis using Excel - Lookup & Merging Techniques, PivotTable & Grouping, Conditional Formatting, Scenario and Sensitivity Analysis

Business Analyst Fellowship (BA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 8: SQL Foundation - Introduction to Database, Selection, Filtering & Ordering, Data Types, Operators and functions, Aggregate and Group By commands
Business Analyst Fellowship (BA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 9: Data Manipulation with SQL - Conditional and Case Statements, Working with date/timestamps, Joins, Subqueries
Business Analyst Fellowship (BA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 10: Advanced Data Manipulation with SQL - Common Table Expression (CTE), Window functions in SQL, SET operators
Business Analyst Fellowship (BA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 11: Introduction to Python
Business Analyst Fellowship (BA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 12: Programming in Python
Business Analyst Fellowship (BA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 13: Data Analysis using Python
Business Analyst Fellowship (BA) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 14: AI for Business Analysts
Applied Generative AI Bootcamp Overview: Duration 10 Weeks, Live Hours 60+ Hours. Next cohort starts Mar 14.
Applied Generative AI Bootcamp Cost: Base price is ₹39,999, discounted to ₹31,999. Price increase deadline: N/A.
Instructors and Mentors for Applied Generative AI Bootcamp: Arindam Mukherjee, Eshan Tiwari, Taruna Manchanda, Kartik Singh, Pranav Pathak.
Applied Generative AI Bootcamp Outcomes: Average Salary N/A, Highest Salary N/A. Placement Support: Certification.

Applied Generative AI Bootcamp (GenAI / AI) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 1: AI System Design - APIs, Webhooks, SDKs, System Design Principles, AI system architecture, Probabilistic vs deterministic design
Applied Generative AI Bootcamp (GenAI / AI) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 2: LLMs & Prompt Engineering - How LLMs work, Prompt types & CoT, System/role style guides, Debugging prompt failures

Applied Generative AI Bootcamp (GenAI / AI) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 3: RAGs & AI Workflow Automation - Embeddings & vector databases, Chunking & retrieval, Workflow triggers & JSON, Orchestrating LLM steps
Applied Generative AI Bootcamp (GenAI / AI) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 4: AI Agents & Protocols - ReAct & planner–executor, Tool selection policies, Memory & RAG grounding, MCP basics & scope
Applied Generative AI Bootcamp (GenAI / AI) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 5: AI Output Evaluation - Failure modes & bias, Eval rubrics & metrics, Golden sets & A/B tests, LLM-as-judge limits
Applied Generative AI Bootcamp (GenAI / AI) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 6: Building Voice Agents - Voice UX & latency, STT→LLM→TTS loop, Privacy, consent, fallback, Speech to Speech models

Applied Generative AI Bootcamp (GenAI / AI) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 7: Advanced AI Prototyping - Principles of vibe coding, Choosing the right tool, UI to full-stack prototype, Cost & latency logging

Applied Generative AI Bootcamp (GenAI / AI) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 8: AI Product Strategy - Identifying AI use cases, Understanding trade-offs, AI Growth Metrics, AI Virality & Distribution Loops

Applied Generative AI Bootcamp (GenAI / AI) Curriculum & Syllabus - Week 9 & 10: Capstone Project & Demo Day - Group Demos (upto 3 members), Combines automation, agent design, RAG, and output evaluation, Prepare for Demo Day presentation

Knowledge Item - Cohort: A cohort at NextLeap refers to a specific batch of students starting the fellowship together. For example, 'Cohort 48' is the 48th iteration of the program. Context: The fact that Cohort 48 is starting indicates that 47 batches have successfully been launched or completed previously.
Knowledge Item - PM: PM stands for Product Manager Fellowship. Context: NextLeap offers a 16-week Product Manager Fellowship.
Knowledge Item - UX: UX or UI/UX refers to the UI/UX Designer Fellowship. Context: The UI/UX Designer Fellowship is a 4-month program.
Knowledge Item - DA: DA stands for Data Analyst Fellowship. Context: The Data Analyst Fellowship is a 16-week program.
Knowledge Item - BA: BA stands for Business Analyst Fellowship. Context: The Business Analyst Fellowship is an 18-week program.
Knowledge Item - GenAI: GenAI or AI refers to the Applied Generative AI Bootcamp. Context: The Applied Generative AI Bootcamp is a 10-week intensive course.
